violations.text: The following equipment was observed in poor repair. -The walk-in freezer is not operational. -The walk-in cooler was observed holding an ambient temperature of 46 DF. No TCS foods are being stored in unit and all TCS foods are being rejected until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Per PIC, a work order is in place for both units. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2025
The dumpster area outside was observed with an accumulation of debris. Refuse areas must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
